name: 01_raw_at_lower_clamp_boundary
description: Raw value lands exactly on the lower clamp boundary (VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MIN = -3.0). The clamp returns -3.0 unchanged (max of -3.0 and -3.0).
derivation: raw = -(2.0 * 1.5) = -3.0. min(-0.5, -3.0) = -3.0. max(-3.0, -3.0) = -3.0. Boundary case: raw equals VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MIN exactly.
